title: Craftable Hearts
description: This mod adds a new crafting station called the Heart Forge that allows you to craft additional permanent hearts with a diamond, glistering melon slice, nether star, and an enchanted golden apple!
body:
This mod adds a new crafting station called the Heart Forge that allows you to craft additional permanent hearts with a diamond, glistering melon slice, nether star, and an enchanted golden apple!

The Heart Forge can be crafted with a crafting table, 3 netherite ingots, 4 gold ingots, and a heavy weighted pressure plate (configuration shown in gallery).

The Heart Forge also renders the ingredients in it and any outputted hearts above it!

Hearts can be consumed by right-clicking with them in hand and will persist even if you die, so you don't lose them!

In the Creative inventory, the Heart Forge can be found at the bottom of the Functional tab and the Heart item can be found at the bottom of the Food & Drinks tab.

There is no direct limit imposed on how many hearts you can craft and use!
